notes.None: Parameter not recorded for this period
notes.scanned_pages: Pages 60-86 contain scanned images; data could not be extracted via text parsing. These pages likely cover monitoring data from 2018 to early 2020.
notes.data_note: FC and TC values reported as MPN/100ml. Some early months (Nov-Dec 2024, Jan 2025) did not record FC/TC values in the source document.
